fallback_findings_resolved: Grapheme payload is cell-local only and is stripped from cursor extended attrs before writing a new cell.
Parser anchor tests cover final-column pending wrap, CJK wide-head attachment, cursor-motion clearing, ZWJ, flags, and REP.
Copy, live render, pane.capture, and raster paths have display_text coverage.
Raster fallback is documented as conservative fontdue scalar rendering, not full shaping.
Performance evidence includes pre-change baseline from commit 6e6128a.
verdict: Design is approved by the current Claude consult and earlier fallback review. Claude+Gemini council synthesis remained unreliable; Gemini design consult timed out.
